boundaries.definition: Interatomic force is represented as the negative radial gradient of a molecular potential energy surface.
Molecular carbon bonding stress is not a closure, solution, or mechanism for gravity, mass anomalies, or spacetime metric backreaction.

nonclaims: This artifact does not prove a new force.
This artifact does not identify a gravity anomaly from carbon bonding alone.
This artifact does not map molecular pressure into a general relativistic metric tensor.
This artifact does not equate covalent bonding with macroscopic magnetic pole behavior.
